'''âm-th-b-zh''' ('''kamathbezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alkalinize|alkalinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alkalinize|alkalinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-th-b-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kamathbezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimathbezhoko|thimathbezhoko]] || [[word:jimathbezhoko|jimathbezhoko]] || [[word:shimathbezhoko|shimathbezhoko]] || [[word:kimathbezhoko|kimathbezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumathbezhoko|thuthumathbezhoko]] || [[word:jujumathbezhoko|jujumathbezhoko]] || [[word:shushumathbezhoko|shushumathbezhoko]] || [[word:kukumathbezhoko|kukumathbezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
